Discovery & booking, end to end

Browse saunas, read reviews, and book your session — all in one beautifully designed app.

For Business

Grow your sauna business

List your sauna on Seána and get discovered by thousands of wellness seekers across Ireland. Sign up directly or book a quick call if you'd like to chat first.

📊

Real-Time Analytics

See who's viewing your listing, track bookings, and understand your customers with a live dashboard.

🔥

Featured Placement

Get priority placement on the Discover tab and map, putting your sauna in front of the right audience.

📱

Direct Bookings

Accept bookings directly through the app with Stripe-powered payments. Secure, instant, and no third-party middlemen.

📍

Multi-Location Management

Manage all your sauna locations from a single account in the app. Switch between branches, track bookings, and stay in control.

We value your privacy

We use cookies to remember your preferences and understand how Seána is used. You can accept or decline non-essential cookies. See our Privacy Policy.
